name: Aisha Rahman
bio: Met during freshman orientation. She moved to Toronto after graduation and works as a UX designer. We used to pull all-nighters together before exams.

name: Marcus Thompson
bio: We started at the same company the same week. Now we hit the gym every Tuesday. He got me into Brazilian jiu-jitsu last year.

name: Sofia Mendez
bio: We grew up on the same street and went to the same school from age 6 to 18. She lives in Madrid now and is raising two kids. Time zones make it hard.

name: Daniel Park
bio: Senior engineer I met at a hackathon. He mentored me through my first job search and we still geek out over side projects and new frameworks.

name: Priya Nair
bio: My roommate for two years in university. We've backpacked through Vietnam and Portugal together. She just started her MBA and we try to catch up weekly.

name: James Okafor
bio: Our families have known each other for over 20 years. We drifted apart after he moved to Lagos for work. I keep meaning to schedule a proper video call.

name: Lena Fischer
bio: We worked on the same product team for three years before she moved back to Berlin. We started a two-person book club during the pandemic and somehow kept it going.

name: Carlos Rivera
bio: Met when we both moved into the same apartment building. We grab coffee most weekends and collaborate on street photography projects. He taught me film photography.
